description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the coderus/sailfishos-platform-sdk-base:latest Docker image and runs `source cancro.env` as a before_script for all jobs. Define a single stage called build and add a job named run-build in that stage that executes the exact command `./run-mic.sh`. Configure the run-build job to publish any `*.zip` files under `sfe-*` directories as artifacts, and restrict its execution to the `web` branch and tag pipelines only.
